title: Atlantis Loans - REKT
relevance_summary: Governance proposal with flash-loaned votes on DAO

prevention.rule: Block any tx that upgrades governance contracts with a governance proposal in the same tx.

summary: Atlantis Loans, an abandoned lending protocol on BSC, was exploited via a governance attack where an attacker pushed and voted through a proposal to upgrade the contract with malicious ones, draining funds. A guard could have blocked such transactions.
